description:
Open the dataset '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/BFI25.csv' in Jamovi. Create five computed variables representing the Big Five personality traits ('Agreeableness', 'Conscientiousness', 'Extraversion', 'Neuroticism', and 'Openness') by calculating the mean of their respective items (A1-A5, C1-C5, E1-E5, N1-N5, and O1-O5). Set the 'gender' variable to the 'Nominal' measure type and perform a Binomial Logistic Regression to predict 'gender' using the five personality variables as covariates, ensuring the classification table and AUC (Area Under the Curve) are included in the model performance results. Save the Jamovi project to '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/BFI_Gender_Prediction.omv' and report the AUC and Accuracy values in '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/model_accuracy_report.txt' formatted as:
AUC: <value>
Accuracy: <value>
